data.name: Premium Wax and Polish
data.description: Give your car a brilliant shine with premium wax protection. Restores paint gloss and provides long-lasting protection against dirt, water, UV rays, and minor scratches.

data.name: Underbody Wash
data.description: Deep cleaning of the vehicle's underbody to remove dirt, mud, salt, and road debris, helping prevent rust and corrosion.

data.name: Ceramic Coating Protection
data.description: Premium ceramic coating that protects your vehicle's paint while providing a deep glossy finish and hydrophobic effect.

data.name: Basic Exterior Wash
data.description: Complete exterior foam wash with wheel cleaning, drying, and tire shine for a fresh, clean look.

data.name: Interior Deep Cleaning
data.description: Complete interior detailing including vacuuming, shampooing, dashboard polishing, leather care, and window cleaning.

data.name: Headlight Restoration
data.description: Restore faded and cloudy headlights to improve nighttime visibility and enhance your vehicle's appearance.

data.name: Full Detailing Package
data.description: Complete detailing service including exterior wash, interior cleaning, waxing, tire dressing, engine bay cleaning, and glass polishing.

data.name: Engine Bay Cleaning
data.description: Professional cleaning and degreasing of the engine bay for better performance, cooling, and aesthetics.

data.name: Paint Protection Film (PPF)
data.description: High-quality transparent film installed on vulnerable paint surfaces to protect against scratches, chips, and UV damage.

data.name: Tire & Wheel Detailing
data.description: Deep cleaning of wheels and tires with premium tire dressing for a showroom-quality finish.
